title: pternix deflorata
intro:
Pternix deflorata is a type of flowering plant, scientifically known as Clerodendrum serratum, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and distinctive serrated leaves.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions.

The health benefits of Pternix deflorata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and body aches, and promote digestive health. 

In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
